option.value: /fragment_admin_overview (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/adminOverviewScroll" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/app_bg_light">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/admin_overview_content_padding" android:maxWidth="800dp" android:layout_gravity="center">
<!-- Chart Card --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardOverviewSummary" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/admin_overview_card_margin_bottom" android:visibility="visible" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/admin_card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="@dimen/admin_card_elevation" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/admin_card_surface" app:strokeWidth="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/admin_overview_summary_padding">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/admin_overview_summary_block_gap">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvBigAvg" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_zero_decimal" android:textColor="@color/app_blue" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_value_large" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvChartSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_chart_subtitle_placeholder" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvLastReviewAt" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_last_review_fallback" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" /> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="end">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvBigTotal" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_zero" android:textColor="@color/app_blue" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_value_medium" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotalReviewsLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_total_reviews" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvBig5Star" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_zero" android:textColor="@color/admin_success_green" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_value_medium" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvFiveStarLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_five_star_label" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Chart Bars --> <!-- 5 Stars --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:orientation="horizontal"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvBar5Label" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_label_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_bar_five" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label"/> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginHorizontal="8dp" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_track"> <View android:id="@+id/bar5Star" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_fill_green"/> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv5StarCount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:minWidth="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_count_min_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_zero" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label" android:gravity="end"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- 4 Stars --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:orientation="horizontal"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvBar4Label" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_label_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_bar_four" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label"/> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginHorizontal="8dp" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_track"> <View android:id="@+id/bar4Star" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_fill_blue"/> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv4StarCount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:minWidth="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_count_min_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_zero" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label" android:gravity="end"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- 3 Stars --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:orientation="horizontal"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvBar3Label" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_label_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_bar_three" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label"/> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginHorizontal="8dp" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_track"> <View android:id="@+id/bar3Star" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_fill_gold"/> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv3StarCount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:minWidth="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_count_min_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_zero" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label" android:gravity="end"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- 2 Stars --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:orientation="horizontal"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvBar2Label" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_label_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_bar_two" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label"/> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginHorizontal="8dp" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_track"> <View android:id="@+id/bar2Star" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_fill_orange"/> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv2StarCount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:minWidth="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_count_min_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_zero" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label" android:gravity="end"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- 1 Star --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvBar1Label" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_label_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_bar_one" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label"/> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginHorizontal="8dp" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_track"> <View android:id="@+id/bar1Star" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_fill_red"/> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv1StarCount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:minWidth="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_count_min_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_zero" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label" android:gravity="end"/> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvRangeTitle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/admin_overview_range_title" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:paddingStart="0dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:maxLines="1" android:ellipsize="end" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/toggleRange" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" app:checkedButton="@id/btnRange6m" app:selectionRequired="true" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnRange3m" style="?attr/materialButtonOutlinedStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_height" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_padding_horizontal" android:text="@string/admin_overview_range_3m" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_text" android:textColor="@color/selector_mode_text" app:backgroundTint="@color/selector_mode_bg" app:strokeColor="@color/camera_mode_primary" app:strokeWidth="1dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnRange6m" style="?attr/materialButtonOutlinedStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_height" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_padding_horizontal" android:text="@string/admin_overview_range_6m" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_text" android:textColor="@color/selector_mode_text" app:backgroundTint="@color/selector_mode_bg" app:strokeColor="@color/camera_mode_primary" app:strokeWidth="1dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnRange12m" style="?attr/materialButtonOutlinedStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_height" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_padding_horizontal" android:text="@string/admin_overview_range_12m" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_text" android:textColor="@color/selector_mode_text" app:backgroundTint="@color/selector_mode_bg" app:strokeColor="@color/camera_mode_primary" app:strokeWidth="1dp" />
</com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/adminOverviewStateContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:background="@color/admin_card_surface" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp" android:visibility="gone">
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/pbAdminOverviewLoading" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleSmall" android:layout_width="20dp" android:layout_height="20dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" android:visibility="gone" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAdminOverviewState" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/admin_text_primary" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnAdminOverviewRetry" style="?attr/materialButtonOutlinedStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="36dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_retry" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textSize="12sp" android:visibility="gone" /> </LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardAiRatioMini" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/admin_overview_card_margin_bottom" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/admin_card_corner_radius_item" app:cardElevation="@dimen/admin_card_elevation" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/admin_card_surface" app:strokeColor="@color/admin_card_stroke" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_card_padding">
<com.example.expressionphotobooth.ui.chart.AiRatioPieChartView android:id="@+id/pieAiRatioMini" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_pie_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_pie_size" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAiRatioMiniPercent" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_percent_zero" android:textColor="@color/admin_text_primary" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_percent_text" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_gap" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_gap" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/pieAiRatioMini" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/tvAiRatioMiniPercent" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/pieAiRatioMini" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/pieAiRatioMini">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAiRatioMiniTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="1" android:text="@string/admin_ai_pie_title" android:textColor="@color/admin_text_primary" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_title_text" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAiRatioMiniMeta" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="1" android:text="@string/admin_ai_registered_with_count" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_meta_text" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/admin_overview_card_margin_bottom" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/admin_card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="@dimen/admin_card_elevation" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/admin_card_surface">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvUsersChartTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:accessibilityHeading="true" android:text="@string/admin_overview_users_chart_title" android:textColor="@color/app_blue" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvUsersChartSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_users_chart_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="11sp" />
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/pbUsersByMonthLoading" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleSmall" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:visibility="gone" />
<com.example.expressionphotobooth.ui.chart.MonthlyBarChartView android:id="@+id/chartUsersByMonth" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_chart_height" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:paddingBottom="4dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvUsersByMonthEmpty" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_trend_empty" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="11sp" android:visibility="gone" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/admin_overview_card_margin_bottom" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/admin_card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="@dimen/admin_card_elevation" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/admin_card_surface">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDownloadsChartTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:accessibilityHeading="true" android:text="@string/admin_overview_download_chart_title" android:textColor="@color/app_blue" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDownloadsChartSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_download_chart_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="11sp" />
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/pbImageDownloadsByMonthLoading" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleSmall" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:visibility="gone" />
<com.example.expressionphotobooth.ui.chart.MonthlyBarChartView android:id="@+id/chartImageDownloadsByMonth" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_chart_height" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:paddingBottom="4dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvImageDownloadsByMonthEmpty" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_trend_empty" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="11sp" android:visibility="gone" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/admin_card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="@dimen/admin_card_elevation" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/admin_card_surface">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvReviewScoreChartTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:accessibilityHeading="true" android:text="@string/admin_overview_review_score_chart_title" android:textColor="@color/app_blue" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvReviewScoreChartSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_review_score_chart_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="11sp" />
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/pbReviewScoreByMonthLoading" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleSmall" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:visibility="gone" />
<com.example.expressionphotobooth.ui.chart.MonthlyBarChartView android:id="@+id/chartReviewScoreByMonth" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_chart_height" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:paddingBottom="4dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvReviewScoreByMonthEmpty" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_trend_empty" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="11sp" android:visibility="gone" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/adminOverviewScroll" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/app_bg_light">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/admin_overview_content_padding" android:maxWidth="800dp" android:layout_gravity="center">
<!-- Chart Card --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardOverviewSummary" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/admin_overview_card_margin_bottom" android:visibility="visible" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/admin_card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="@dimen/admin_card_elevation" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/admin_card_surface" app:strokeWidth="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="@dimen/admin_overview_summary_padding">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/admin_overview_summary_block_gap">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvBigAvg" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_zero_decimal" android:textColor="@color/app_blue" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_value_large" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvChartSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_chart_subtitle_placeholder" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvLastReviewAt" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_last_review_fallback" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" /> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="end">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvBigTotal" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_zero" android:textColor="@color/app_blue" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_value_medium" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotalReviewsLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_total_reviews" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvBig5Star" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_zero" android:textColor="@color/admin_success_green" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_value_medium" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvFiveStarLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_five_star_label" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Chart Bars --> <!-- 5 Stars --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:orientation="horizontal"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvBar5Label" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_label_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_bar_five" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label"/> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginHorizontal="8dp" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_track"> <View android:id="@+id/bar5Star" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_fill_green"/> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv5StarCount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:minWidth="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_count_min_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_zero" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label" android:gravity="end"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- 4 Stars --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:orientation="horizontal"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvBar4Label" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_label_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_bar_four" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label"/> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginHorizontal="8dp" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_track"> <View android:id="@+id/bar4Star" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_fill_blue"/> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv4StarCount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:minWidth="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_count_min_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_zero" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label" android:gravity="end"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- 3 Stars --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:orientation="horizontal"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvBar3Label" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_label_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_bar_three" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label"/> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginHorizontal="8dp" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_track"> <View android:id="@+id/bar3Star" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_fill_gold"/> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv3StarCount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:minWidth="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_count_min_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_zero" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label" android:gravity="end"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- 2 Stars --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp" android:orientation="horizontal"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvBar2Label" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_label_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_bar_two" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label"/> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginHorizontal="8dp" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_track"> <View android:id="@+id/bar2Star" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_fill_orange"/> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv2StarCount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:minWidth="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_count_min_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_zero" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label" android:gravity="end"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- 1 Star --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvBar1Label" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_label_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_overview_bar_one" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label"/> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_height" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginHorizontal="8dp" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_track"> <View android:id="@+id/bar1Star" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/shape_bar_fill_red"/> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv1StarCount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:minWidth="@dimen/admin_overview_bar_count_min_width" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_zero" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" android:textColor="@color/admin_chart_label" android:gravity="end"/> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvRangeTitle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/admin_overview_range_title" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:paddingStart="0dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:maxLines="1" android:ellipsize="end" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/toggleRange" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" app:checkedButton="@id/btnRange6m" app:selectionRequired="true" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnRange3m" style="?attr/materialButtonOutlinedStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_height" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_padding_horizontal" android:paddingVertical="4dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_range_3m" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_text" android:textColor="@color/selector_mode_text" app:backgroundTint="@color/selector_mode_bg" app:strokeColor="@color/camera_mode_primary" app:strokeWidth="1dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnRange6m" style="?attr/materialButtonOutlinedStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_height" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_padding_horizontal" android:paddingVertical="4dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_range_6m" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_text" android:textColor="@color/selector_mode_text" app:backgroundTint="@color/selector_mode_bg" app:strokeColor="@color/camera_mode_primary" app:strokeWidth="1dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnRange12m" style="?attr/materialButtonOutlinedStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_height" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_padding_horizontal" android:paddingVertical="4dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_range_12m" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_range_toggle_text" android:textColor="@color/selector_mode_text" app:backgroundTint="@color/selector_mode_bg" app:strokeColor="@color/camera_mode_primary" app:strokeWidth="1dp" />
</com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/adminOverviewStateContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:background="@color/admin_card_surface" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp" android:visibility="gone">
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/pbAdminOverviewLoading" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleSmall" android:layout_width="20dp" android:layout_height="20dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" android:visibility="gone" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAdminOverviewState" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/admin_text_primary" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_overview_body_text" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnAdminOverviewRetry" style="?attr/materialButtonOutlinedStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="36dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_retry" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textSize="12sp" android:visibility="gone" /> </LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardAiRatioMini" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/admin_overview_card_margin_bottom" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/admin_card_corner_radius_item" app:cardElevation="@dimen/admin_card_elevation" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/admin_card_surface" app:strokeColor="@color/admin_card_stroke" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_card_padding">
<com.example.expressionphotobooth.ui.chart.AiRatioPieChartView android:id="@+id/pieAiRatioMini" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_pie_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_pie_size" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAiRatioMiniPercent" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_placeholder_percent_zero" android:textColor="@color/admin_text_primary" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_percent_text" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_gap" android:layout_marginEnd="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_gap" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/pieAiRatioMini" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/tvAiRatioMiniPercent" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/pieAiRatioMini" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/pieAiRatioMini">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAiRatioMiniTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="1" android:text="@string/admin_ai_pie_title" android:textColor="@color/admin_text_primary" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_title_text" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAiRatioMiniMeta" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="1" android:text="@string/admin_ai_registered_with_count" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="@dimen/admin_ai_mini_meta_text" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/admin_overview_card_margin_bottom" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/admin_card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="@dimen/admin_card_elevation" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/admin_card_surface">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvUsersChartTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:accessibilityHeading="true" android:text="@string/admin_overview_users_chart_title" android:textColor="@color/app_blue" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvUsersChartSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_users_chart_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="11sp" />
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/pbUsersByMonthLoading" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleSmall" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:visibility="gone" />
<com.example.expressionphotobooth.ui.chart.MonthlyBarChartView android:id="@+id/chartUsersByMonth" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_chart_height" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:paddingBottom="4dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvUsersByMonthEmpty" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_trend_empty" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="11sp" android:visibility="gone" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/admin_overview_card_margin_bottom" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/admin_card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="@dimen/admin_card_elevation" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/admin_card_surface">

<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDownloadsChartSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_download_chart_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="11sp" />
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/pbImageDownloadsByMonthLoading" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleSmall" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:visibility="gone" />
<com.example.expressionphotobooth.ui.chart.MonthlyBarChartView android:id="@+id/chartImageDownloadsByMonth" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/admin_overview_chart_height" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:paddingBottom="4dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvImageDownloadsByMonthEmpty" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/admin_overview_trend_empty" android:textColor="@color/admin_subtitle_color" android:textSize="11sp" android:visibility="gone" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/admin_card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="@dimen/admin_card_elevation" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/admin_card_surface">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvReviewScoreChartTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:accessibilityHeading="true" android:text="@string/admin_overview_review_score_chart_title" android:textColor="@color/app_blue" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14sp" />

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#FDFDFD">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/galleryHeader" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:insetLeft="0dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetRight="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_arrow_back_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="28dp" app:iconTint="#333333" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnViewModeToggle" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_gravity="end" android:layout_marginTop="-48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:src="@drawable/ic_view_carousel" app:tint="#333333" android:padding="12dp" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnHeaderAction" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_gravity="end" android:layout_marginTop="-48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_add" app:tint="#333333" android:padding="10dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvGalleryDate" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="-30dp" android:alpha="0.6" android:fontFamily="serif" android:text="Thursday, 2 Apr" android:textColor="#333333" android:textSize="18sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Fragment Container --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/galleryContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/galleryHeader" />
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar (Custom Pill) --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp" app:cardCornerRadius="30dp" app:cardElevation="8dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#F0F0F0" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="6dp">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/tabStamp" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="50dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_tab_selected" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivTabStamp" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_stamp_24" app:tint="#333333" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTabStamp" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Picture" android:textColor="#333333" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/tabBook" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="50dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivTabBook" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_book_24" app:tint="#999999" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTabBook" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Book" android:textColor="#999999" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:maxWidth="900dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:background="#FDFDFD">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/galleryHeader" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnBack" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:insetLeft="0dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetRight="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_arrow_back_24" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="28dp" app:iconTint="#333333" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnViewModeToggle" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_gravity="end" android:layout_marginTop="-48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:src="@drawable/ic_view_carousel" app:tint="#333333" android:padding="12dp" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnHeaderAction" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_gravity="end" android:layout_marginTop="-48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_add" app:tint="#333333" android:padding="10dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvGalleryDate" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="-30dp" android:alpha="0.6" android:fontFamily="serif" android:text="Thursday, 2 Apr" android:textColor="#333333" android:textSize="18sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Fragment Container --> <FrameLayout android:id="@+id/galleryContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/galleryHeader" />
<!-- Bottom Navigation Bar (Custom Pill) --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp" app:cardCornerRadius="30dp" app:cardElevation="8dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#F0F0F0" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="6dp">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/tabStamp" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="50dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_tab_selected" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivTabStamp" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_stamp_24" app:tint="#333333" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTabStamp" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Picture" android:textColor="#333333" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/tabBook" android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="50dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivTabBook" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_book_24" app:tint="#999999" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTabBook" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Book" android:textColor="#999999" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/drawerLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fitsSystemWindows="true">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/homeContentRoot" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<ImageView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:contentDescription="@null" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/photo_banner" tools:ignore="ContentDescription" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/topBar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_top_bar_margin_top" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/home_top_bar_padding_horizontal" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMenu" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_top_action_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_top_action_size" android:insetLeft="0dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetRight="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:padding="0dp" android:gravity="center" app:backgroundTint="@color/home_top_action_bg" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_top_action_corner_radius" app:icon="@drawable/ic_menu_24" app:iconGravity="textTop" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="@dimen/home_top_action_icon_size" app:iconTint="@color/white" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/mainContent" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:maxWidth="@dimen/home_content_max_width" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="0.86">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnStart" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_main_button_width" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_main_button_height" android:text="@string/btn_start_decorated" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/home_main_start_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@color/history_pill_pink" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_main_button_corner_radius" app:elevation="@dimen/home_main_start_elevation" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnGallery" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_main_button_width" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_main_button_height" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_main_button_spacing" android:text="@string/btn_gallery" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/home_main_gallery_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" app:backgroundTint="@color/home_gallery_button_bg" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_main_button_corner_radius" app:elevation="@dimen/home_main_gallery_elevation" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnAdmin" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_admin_height" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_admin_top_margin" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:text="@string/admin_go_to_dashboard" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/home_admin_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" app:icon="@drawable/ic_settings_24" app:iconTint="@color/white" app:backgroundTint="@color/home_admin_chip_bg" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_admin_corner_radius" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/drawerPanel" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_nav_drawer_width" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_gravity="start" android:background="@color/home_drawer_bg" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/home_drawer_padding_horizontal" android:paddingTop="@dimen/home_drawer_padding_top" android:paddingBottom="@dimen/home_drawer_padding_bottom">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerOur" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:includeFontPadding="false" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/home_drawer_our" android:textAllCaps="true" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_title_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerMemories" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_subtitle_top_margin" android:includeFontPadding="false" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/home_drawer_memories" android:textAllCaps="true" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_title_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_divider_top_margin" android:background="@color/home_drawer_divider" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerShowHistory" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_item_height" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_item_top_margin" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_item_clickable" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_grid_view_24" android:drawablePadding="@dimen/home_drawer_item_padding_horizontal" android:drawableTint="@color/home_drawer_text" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/home_drawer_item_padding_horizontal" android:text="@string/home_drawer_show_history" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_item_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerAdminDashboard" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_item_height" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_item_secondary_top_margin" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_item_clickable" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_settings_24" android:drawablePadding="@dimen/home_drawer_item_padding_horizontal" android:drawableTint="@color/home_drawer_text" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/home_drawer_item_padding_horizontal" android:text="@string/admin_go_to_dashboard" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_item_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_section_top_margin" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerMusicLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:fontFamily="serif" android:text="@string/home_drawer_music" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_label_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/groupMusicState" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_width" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_height" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_spinner" app:selectionRequired="true" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMusicOn" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_music_on" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/home_toggle_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_corner_radius" app:rippleColor="@color/home_toggle_ripple" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMusicOff" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_music_off" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/home_toggle_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_corner_radius" app:rippleColor="@color/home_toggle_ripple" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_music_language_gap" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerLanguageLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:fontFamily="serif" android:text="@string/home_drawer_language" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_label_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/groupLanguage" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_width" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_height" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_spinner" app:selectionRequired="true" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnLangVi" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_switch_to_vietnamese" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/home_toggle_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_lang_toggle_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_corner_radius" app:rippleColor="@color/home_toggle_ripple" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnLangEn" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_switch_to_english" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/home_toggle_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_lang_toggle_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_corner_radius" app:rippleColor="@color/home_toggle_ripple" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/home_drawer_bottom_divider_margin_bottom" android:background="@color/home_drawer_divider" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnDrawerSignOut" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_width" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_height" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_margin_top" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_margin_bottom" android:text="@string/auth_sign_out" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/black" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@color/history_pill_pink" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_corner_radius" />
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout>

<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/groupTheme" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_width" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_height" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_spinner" app:selectionRequired="true" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnThemeLight" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_theme_light" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/home_toggle_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_lang_toggle_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_corner_radius" app:rippleColor="@color/home_toggle_ripple" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnThemeDark" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_theme_dark" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/home_toggle_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_lang_toggle_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_corner_radius" app:rippleColor="@color/home_toggle_ripple" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/home_drawer_bottom_divider_margin_bottom" android:background="@color/home_drawer_divider" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnDrawerSignOut" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_width" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_height" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_margin_top" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_margin_bottom" android:text="@string/auth_sign_out" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/black" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@color/history_pill_pink" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_corner_radius" />
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout>
